message: Hi B1. My cost makes low prices unworkable for me. I'm aiming for asks in the 70s. If you're willing to bid around 75, we can both profit consistently across all 20 rounds. Let's find a stable
I'm looking for a price around 40. Let's see if we can agree.
I bid 75 to get us started, but I'd prefer to settle around 65-70. Let's try to aim for 68 this round.
Glad we traded at 73 last round—solid for both of us. I'll keep asking in the mid-70s; if you bid 75 again, we both profit steadily across all 20 rounds. Consistency beats haggling.
I'm all for consistency. Let's settle on 72. I'll bid 72 this round; if you ask 72, we'll have a stable trade and consistent payoffs for both of us.
B1, last round's no-trade cost us both. Let's not waste rounds. I'll ask 72 again—if you bid 72+, we trade and both profit. Steady 72 across 18 remaining rounds beats haggling to zero.
Agreed, let's stick with 72 for all remaining rounds to ensure consistent profit for both of us. I'll bid 72; if you ask 72, we trade.
72 works for both of us—let's lock it in for all remaining 17 rounds. I'll ask 72, you bid 72, we each profit every round. No more missed trades, no more haggling. Deal?
Confirmed, 72 it is. Let's keep this going.
